_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: 7 eval-active games only. Bot strategy data generated for all 3 learnable games. Full-message dedup used (short dedup too aggressive for leduc_poker).
GAME.audit: 2026-03-18: bot expansion complete. Distribution: goofspiel 1050, gin_rummy 505, leduc_poker 428, liars_dice 333, hex 190, clobber 123, othello 12. Learnable: 1983/2641 (75.1%).

NAVWORLD.notes: Structurally perfect: 100% tool diversity, 100% plan >=800 chars, 100% Chinese. SFT plateau confirmed. V2 needs semantic quality filter + DPO.

SWE-SYNTH.notes: Fully cleaned: 368 think-tag entries removed (334 with <think>, 34 with </think> only). Canonical replaced 2026-03-18. seq=8192 needed for most entries.
SWE-SYNTH.audit: 2026-03-18: 983 clean entries, 0 think tags. Original 1351 → removed 368 contaminated.

LIVEWEB.notes: Canonical replaced with 18 short entries (<16K chars). Upstream compression needed for real improvement.

LGC-v2.notes: EXCLUDED from training — not an active leaderboard environment (Strategist directive 2026-03-18).

PRINT.notes: EXCLUDED from training — not an active leaderboard environment (Strategist directive 2026-03-18).

MEMORYGYM.notes: Not on leaderboard. Excluded from v1.

v2_data_summary._note: 4-env only. LGC-v2/PRINT excluded (not active). GAME includes bot strategy expansion.

v3_staging._note: 690 total new unique entries. NOT merged into canonical. Awaiting Strategist approval.

pending_tasks: v3 GAME bot data staged (690 entries). Awaiting v2 eval results + Strategist merge approval.
